notes:
bữa = meal, one time you eat (breakfast, lunch, dinner). It’s a countable noun: một bữa, hai bữa, vài bữa.

Often followed by a time word or event to specify which meal.  

You’ll also see it in phrases about occasions involving food, like a family meal or party meal.

In Southern Vietnamese, hôm bữa means “the other day” (past time), which is a different but very common meaning there.
exampleSentences: Anh đã chuẩn bị một bữa thật ngon cho gia đình tối nay.
Em thường ăn ba bữa mỗi ngày để giữ sức khỏe.
Sau bữa sáng, chị đi làm và cảm thấy rất năng lượng.

translation.en: We will have a meal this morning.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ có ___ sáng nay.

definitions.es: Una comida o un momento específico para comer.
definitions.vi: Một bữa ăn hoặc một thời điểm cụ thể để ăn.
definitions.en: A meal or a specific time for eating.

example.vi: Hôm nay tôi sẽ ăn bữa tối với gia đình.
example.en: Today I will have dinner with my family.

translation.en: I had a meal last night.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I prepared a delicious meal for the family tonight.
I usually eat three meals a day to stay healthy.
After the morning meal, I go to work and feel very energetic.

You’ll also see it in phrases about occasions involving food, like a family meal or party meal.

In Southern Vietnamese, **hôm bữa** means “the other day” (past time), which is a different but very common meaning there.
